headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3. H1 should be text-5xl to text-7xl.

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, labels, and UI elements.

mono.usage: Use for small labels, prices, or technical details.

layout_strategies.hero_alignment: Align text bottom-left or center with massive negative space.

button.styles: rounded-none px-8 py-6 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest font-semibold transition-all duration-300

variants.outline: border border-[#C5A059] text-[#C5A059] hover:bg-[#C5A059] hover:text-black bg-transparent

card.styles: rounded-sm border border-white/5 bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-sm p-8 hover:border-[#C5A059]/30 transition-colors

hero_background.alt: Dimly lit wine cellar with barrels
hero_background.usage: Full screen background for Hero section with heavy overlay.

texture_wood.usage: Background for Diagnosis or Investment section.

product_showcase_1.usage: Showcase section, perhaps with parallax effect.

product_detail.usage: Detail shot in Methodology or About section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Add 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts via import in index.css.
Configure Tailwind colors to match the palette exactly.
Section 1: Hero - Use 'hero_background' image. Title: 'LOST ATELIER'. Sub: 'Strategic Consulting Proposal'.
Section 2: Diagnosis - Dark/Stark contrast. List the core problems identified.
Section 3: Value Prop & Services - Grid layout using 'product_showcase_1'.
Section 4: Methodology - Vertical timeline. 3 Fases (45 Days).
Section 6: Contact - Simple form or mailto link.
Use 'glassmorphism' styles for cards over images.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (WCAG AA).
Do NOT use standard Shadcn cards; customize them to be border-only or glass.
For the 'Marquee' effect (if used), ensure it is slow and elegant (Serif font).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Use 2-3x more padding than usual (e.g., py-32).
Micro-interactions on every button and link.
No gradient text unless it is very subtle gold shimmer.
Dark mode is the ONLY mode for this landing page.
